{{Quote|Imperial stormtroopers cannot be bribed or blackmailed. Belgarian officers make up for all of them.|Belgarian proverb|<ref name="CW" />}}
'''Brivyl Goss''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who served in the remote [[Belgaroth system/Legends|Belgaroth star system]]. Against the backdrop of the Empire’s image as a machine filled with disciplined [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and competent [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]], Goss stood out as a flagrant exception.

==Biography==
Brivyl Goss built his career in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] solely through luck rather than skill. Although he successfully completed the assignments given to him, his accomplishments were more the result of coincidence than of expertise or initiative. The Galactic Empire assigned him to the planet [[Belgaroth]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] – a dead-end and remote post where those whose absence would raise no questions were typically sent.<ref name="CW" />

[[12 BBY/Legends|Twelve years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], holding the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Brivyl Goss took command of Belgaroth’s [[Upside|orbital docks]]. However, just two years later, he received orders to destroy the orbital station and evacuate the planet. Finding the order dull, Goss instead selected a few trusted junior [[officers]] and left the [[Belgaroth system/Legends|star system]] aboard a requisitioned [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].<ref name="CW" />

==Personality==
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Goss was a non-aggressive [[Human/Legends|human]] who preferred to avoid confrontations. He was lazy, untidy, inconsistent, and prone to [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]] abuse. Despite this, he was content with life on the edge of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], unlike most [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]]. Within the Empire, he was considered a disgrace – and not without reason, for the right amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] he was willing to sell any classified information.<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Imperial Lieutenant Brivyl Goss was created for the ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' sourcebook {{C|[[2003]]}} for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. He was a supporting character designed for use by players in their own story campaigns.
